rule.description: Arcenum [CRITICAL]: AWS Root account activity detected - Attackers use root for complete resource control and bypassing guardrails (© 2024 Pradhyumna Ghogare / Arcenum Systems)
Arcenum [HIGH]: IAM policy attached to user/role - Attacker attempting privilege escalation to gain admin access (© 2024 Pradhyumna Ghogare / Arcenum Systems)
Arcenum [HIGH]: New IAM access key created - Attacker establishing persistent backdoor access to AWS environment (© 2024 Pradhyumna Ghogare / Arcenum Systems)
Arcenum [HIGH]: User added to IAM group - Unauthorized privilege grant for lateral movement (© 2024 Pradhyumna Ghogare / Arcenum Systems)
Arcenum [HIGH]: IAM role trust policy updated - Attacker setting up cross-account privilege escalation (© 2024 Pradhyumna Ghogare / Arcenum Systems)
Arcenum [CRITICAL]: CloudTrail logging disabled or modified - Active defense evasion to hide malicious API calls (© 2024 Pradhyumna Ghogare / Arcenum Systems)
Arcenum [HIGH]: VPC flow logs deleted - Attacker intentionally removing network visibility to hide C2/exfil (© 2024 Pradhyumna Ghogare / Arcenum Systems)
Arcenum [HIGH]: S3 bucket policy/ACL modified - Attacker exposing bucket publicly for data exfiltration (© 2024 Pradhyumna Ghogare / Arcenum Systems)
Arcenum [HIGH]: Sensitive S3 bucket object access - Active data exfiltration of critical databases or secrets (© 2024 Pradhyumna Ghogare / Arcenum Systems)
Arcenum [MEDIUM]: New EC2 instance launched - Possible resource hijacking for cryptomining or rogue C2 infra (© 2024 Pradhyumna Ghogare / Arcenum Systems)
Arcenum [HIGH]: Security group inbound rule added - Attacker opening unauthorized external access (e.g. SSH/RDP) (© 2024 Pradhyumna Ghogare / Arcenum Systems)
Arcenum [MEDIUM]: AWS environment enumeration detected - Attacker performing discovery and mapping before lateral movement (© 2024 Pradhyumna Ghogare / Arcenum Systems)
Arcenum [MEDIUM]: AWS Console login failure - Potential brute force or credential stuffing attack on console (© 2024 Pradhyumna Ghogare / Arcenum Systems)
Arcenum [MEDIUM]: AWS Console login without MFA - Security policy violation and high risk of account takeover (© 2024 Pradhyumna Ghogare / Arcenum Systems)
